description: Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats can be used by Enchanters to learn Exceptional Stats at 345 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.
name: Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats Phase 1 Item Level 69 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (345) Requires Honor Hold - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant chest armor to increase all stats by 6. Permanently enchant a piece of chest armor to add 6 to all stats. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats can be used by Enchanters to learn Exceptional Stats at 345 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.
